title: Expand language list using authoritative sources and enforce perfectly alphabetical ordering

requirements.text: Expand the built-in language list in frontend/src/constants/languages.ts to include a comprehensive, authoritative set of base world languages (excluding dialects/variants), while keeping the existing "No language (music)" option.

quotes: Sure, use sources to know which languages will be most common and useful to add

acceptanceCriteria: SUPPORTED_LANGUAGES contains a comprehensive list of base languages derived from an authoritative standard (e.g., ISO 639-1 base languages), using stable language codes and English labels.
Regional variants/dialects (e.g., en-US, pt-BR) are not included as separate entries; only base languages are included.
The existing option { code: 'none', label: 'No language (music)' } remains available in the list.
getBrowserDefaultLanguage() continues to return a supported base language code when possible, otherwise falls back to 'en'.

requirements.text: Display languages in a single perfectly alphabetical list (by English label) everywhere languages are shown, including the combined list of built-in + user-added custom languages.

quotes: I still feel a lot of languages are missing and they are also not alphabetically displayed.

acceptanceCriteria: Both the floating language filter (frontend/src/components/layout/FloatingLanguageSelector.tsx) and the upload language selector (frontend/src/components/language/LanguageMultiSelectDropdown.tsx) render the language checklist in strictly alphabetical order by label (case-insensitive).
The ordering is applied to the combined list (built-in + custom languages) as a single list; custom languages are not grouped separately.
After adding a custom language, the list remains perfectly alphabetized without requiring a page refresh.
On reload, the list remains perfectly alphabetized after custom languages are loaded from localStorage.

constraints: Frontend immutable paths must not be edited: frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not add backend logic; this change is frontend-only.
Keep all user-facing text in English.
nonGoals: Adding backend-powered language search or fetching language lists from external APIs at runtime.
Adding regional language variants (e.g., en-US, es-MX) as separate selectable languages.
Changing how language filtering works beyond expanding the available languages and ensuring alphabetical ordering.
